title: Cillit Bang Black Mould Remover, 750ml
features: Ideal for use in damp areas where mould is present
description: Product Description Cillit Bang Power Cleaner Black Mould Remover will leave your surfaces shining with a minimal amount of effort. Ideal for use in damp areas such as kitchen and bathroom and areas where mould is prevalent when used according to usage instructions. Ingredients Per 100g product contains 2.19g Sodium Hypochlorite, Contains less than 5% Chlorine Based Bleaching Agents, Disinfectant, Perfume Directions Directions: 1. Turn nozzle to 'on' position. 2. Always test on an inconspicuous area so you know the surface can handle the power. 3. Keep the bottle up right and at least 20cm away from the surface. Spray Turbo Foam directly onto the area to be cleaned and wipe around with a sponge/cloth. 4. Do not leave for more than 5 mins. 5. Rinse thoroughly with water. 6. Revel in the results. 7. After use, rinse sponge/cloth with water. Safety Warning Caution: These surfaces can't handle Cillit Bang's Purposeful Purple Punch: All natural stone like marble, granite, brass, copper, aluminium and zinc plated metals, satinated fittings, linoleum, textiles and carpets, rubber, treated wood floors, etched/matt glass Cillit Bang Power Cleaner Black Mould Remover. Causes serious eye irritation. Causes skin irritation. Warning! Do not use together with other products. May release dangerous gases (chlorine). If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. Keep out of reach of children. Wear protective gloves. If in eyes: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: Get medical advice/attention. If on skin: Wash with plenty of soap and water. If skin irritation occurs: Get medical advice / attention. Dispose of container in accordance with local regulation. Do not contaminate foodstuffs, eating utensils or food contact surfaces. Keep away from treated surfaces until dry. For indoor use only. Wash hands and exposed skin before meals and after use. Keep in a safe place. If swallowed: Immediately call a doctor. To avoid risks to man and the environment, comply with the instructions for use. Per 100g product: 2.6g sodium hypochlorite. Contains <5% Non-Ionic surfactants, chloride-based bleaching agents, Disinfectant, Perfume. Warning Manufacturer Contact Information Reckitt Benckiser, PO Box 4044, Slough, SL1 0NS, UK. See more
